citation: M. Tavallaee, E. Bagheri, W. Lu, and A. Ghorbani, "A Detailed Analysis of the KDD CUP 99 Data Set," Second IEEE Symposium on Computational Intelligence for Security and Defense Applications (CISDA), 2009.
note: Features are an APPROXIMATE mapping from NSL-KDD's connection-level statistics onto the 7-feature honeypot schema -- not a literal equivalence. See in-script comments in map_to_honeypot_schema() for the rationale behind each field.
